title: 10 best herbal creams for insomnia
description: Valeriana officinalis, also known as valerian, creams helps with insomnia because it contains valerenic acids and isovaleric acids, which have a sedative effect on the nervous system. The valerian root has been used for centuries to promote relaxation and calmness, making it easier to fall asleep. The active compounds in the cream bind to GABA receptors in the brain, increasing the production of neurotransmitters that promote sleep. This natural remedy has been shown to improve sleep q...
